languages.text: "Умирающий мир не место для слуг Императора. Я сделаю все, что в моих силах".

traits.locale_text: "Умирающий мир не место для слуг Императора. Я сделаю все, что в моих силах".
"Умирающий мир не место для слуг Императора. Я сделаю все, что в моих силах".

languages.text: "A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will do everything that is in my power."
languages.original_text: "Умирающий мир не место для слуг Императора. Я сделаю все, что в моих силах".

traits.locale_text: "A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will take you with me."
"A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will take you with me."
"A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will do everything that is in my power."

languages.text: "Eine sterbende Welt ist kein Ort für die treuen Diener des Imperators. Ich werde alles tun, was in meiner Macht steht."
languages.original_text: "A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will do everything that is in my power."

languages.text: "Un monde mourant n'est pas un endroit pour les loyaux serviteurs de l'Empereur. Je ferai tout ce qui est en mon pouvoir."
languages.original_text: "A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will do everything that is in my power."

languages.text: "垂死的世界容不下皇帝的忠臣我将竭尽所能"
languages.original_text: "A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will do everything that is in my power."

languages.text: "Un mundo moribundo no es lugar para los leales sirvientes del Emperador. Haré todo lo que esté en mi poder".
languages.original_text: "A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will do everything that is in my power."

languages.text: 「滅びゆく世界に皇帝の忠実な下僕の居場所はない。全力を尽くします"
languages.original_text: "A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will do everything that is in my power."

languages.text: "Ölmekte olan bir dünya, İmparator'un sadık hizmetkârlarına göre bir yer değildir. Elimden gelen her şeyi yapacağım."
languages.original_text: "A dying world is no place for the loyal servants of the Emperor. I will do everything that is in my power."
